message.void_craft.energy_core.depleted: Energy core depleted. The watch cannot recover energy.
tooltip.void_craft.guide_book: Right-click to open the VoidCraft guide
screen.void_craft.guide_book.tip: Pick a chapter on the left. Use the mouse wheel to scroll.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.1: 1. Find void ore underground. It usually generates between Y -30 and -10. Watches, energy cores, and modules can also appear in loot chests.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.2: 2. Kill mobs to collect three energies: hostile mobs drop Chaos Energy, neutral mobs drop Neutral Energy, and friendly mobs drop Pure Energy.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.3: 3. Craft Void Energy from the three energies, then use void ore and energy to make Low Purity Void Crystals, Basic Energy Cores, and a Crude Phase Watch.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.4: 4. Craft a Void Phenomenon Collector, Void Energy Storage Unit, Coordinate Designator, and Low Void Charger.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.5: 5. Put a Low Purity Void Crystal into a Void Phenomenon Collector to produce void energy.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.6: 6. Use the Coordinate Designator to bind the collector to a storage unit or charger.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.7: 7. Put an energy core and modules into the Phase Watch slots.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.start.8: 8. Put the watch in your off hand to use it.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.material.1: Void ore is an early core material. Smelt it into Void Ore for Basic Energy Cores and Low Purity Void Crystals.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.material.2: Chaos Energy mainly comes from hostile mobs.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.material.3: Neutral Energy mainly comes from neutral mobs.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.material.4: Pure Energy mainly comes from friendly mobs.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.material.5: The three energies craft into Void Energy, a key material for later machines, watches, and modules.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.material.6: Low Purity Void Crystals are crafted from void ore and energy. High Purity Void Crystals use Low Purity Void Crystals and Void Energy.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.material.7: Pure Void Crystals are made in the Phase Shallows from 9 High Purity Void Crystals. Void crystals can power collectors.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.1: The Void Phenomenon Collector is the main source of void energy. Put void crystals into its crystal slots.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.2: Collector tiers are Void Phenomenon Collector, Improved Collector, Advanced Collector, and Void Attuner.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.3: The Void Energy Storage Unit buffers void energy and can act as both input and output.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.4: Void Chargers spend void energy to repair energy cores.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.5: Low chargers have 1 slot, mid chargers have 3 slots, and high chargers have 9 slots with faster repair.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.6: The Void Energy Converter converts between void energy and Forge Energy.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.7: Right-click the converter to view cache and connections.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.8: Sneak right-click a converter side to switch it between off, input, and output.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.machine.9: Input sides pull FE from neighbors and convert it to void energy. Output sides spend void energy and push FE to neighbors.
The Coordinate Designator binds void energy machines.
Output mode: right-click the output first, then the input.
Input mode: right-click the input first, then the output.
Unbind mode: open the connection list and remove bindings.
Sneak right-click air to switch modes. Holding the designator shows preview beams for nearby loaded endpoints.
If a Chunk Mapper already has an input, repeat the same binding after the warning to confirm replacement.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.1: The Phase Watch is the core item for module skills. Right-click it to open its screen.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.2: A watch has 2 module slots and 1 energy core slot. Modules choose skills; the core restores energy.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.3: After installing modules and a core, put the watch in your off hand. Module hotkeys use the off-hand watch.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.4: Watch tiers: Crude, Attuned, Stabilized, Resonant, and Void-Energy Grade.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.5: Higher-tier watches have more energy capacity.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.6: Energy cores go in the watch core slot and restore watch energy.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.7: Cores wear down as they work and turn into residue when exhausted.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.watch.8: Use Void Chargers to repair worn energy cores.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.1: Modules in the watch are triggered by hotkeys. Default: F for slot 1, G for slot 2, Q to cancel charged skills.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.2: Some modules have Channel and Burst modes. Burst triggers once and enters cooldown; if cooling down, it can spend energy to fire again.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.3: Module tooltips show mode, level, and modifiers. The same modifier can affect different modules differently.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.4: Void Module enters void state. Recovery Void Module adds healing.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.5: Dash Void Module enters void and dashes for a short time.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.6: Blink modules charge while aiming and blink when released. Safe Blink tries to place the target safely.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.7: Teleport Void Module is expensive and deploys longer-distance teleportation.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.8: Phase Turret Module summons orbiting turrets. Manual turrets use left-click to fire and right-click for volley fire; volley damage decays per turret. Assist turrets pick targets automatically, and health turrets support healing.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.module.9: Phase Rift modules release rift effects. Advanced forms damage mobs in range; tearing pulls all non-player mobs, and annihilation pulls everything except the creator. World Module switches between the overworld and Phase Shallows.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.boost.1: Module Boost Table adds modifier parts to modules.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.boost.2: Put in 1 module and up to 3 modifier parts.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.boost.3: Duplicate modifier types are not allowed. The result slot previews the boosted module.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.boost.4: Main modifier types: cooldown reduction, speed boost, and active duration.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.boost.5: Each module reads modifiers in its own way.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.phase.1: Phase Shallows is VoidCraft's special dimension. Use World Module to enter or leave.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.phase.2: A phase transition plays when entering the dimension.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.phase.3: Phase Shallows shows projections from nearby overworld terrain to help orientation.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.phase.4: In Phase Shallows, place 9 High Purity Void Crystals and wait to make a Pure Void Crystal.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.other.1: Chunk Mapper spends void energy to keep nearby chunks loaded. Its screen shows tier, radius, coverage, cost per tick, and input state.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.other.2: Higher tiers cover more chunks and cost more energy.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.other.3: Void Archer empowers arrows with void trails and an explosion on hit.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.other.4: Void Hunter executes targets within a health range.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.other.5: The execution is area damage, and that area damage can still execute.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.faq.1: Collector not producing? Put a void crystal in the crystal slot.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.faq.2: Machine not receiving energy? Check the designator binding direction and loaded chunks.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.faq.3: Charger not repairing cores? Check void energy input and the core slot.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.faq.4: Modules not working? Check watch energy, core slot, module slots, key bindings, and make sure the watch is in your off hand.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.faq.5: Blink not firing? Charge while aiming and release. Press Q to cancel.
screen.void_craft.guide_book.faq.6: Why does Phase Shallows look like the overworld? It shows projections for orientation and phase visuals, not copied overworld blocks.
message.void_craft.coordinate_designator: Use this on a void transmission block
First block recorded. Choose a target block.
Cannot bind the block to itself
A coordinate block changed. Please retry.
The source cannot output void energy
The target cannot receive void energy
message.void_craft.chunk_mapper.input_ov: Chunk Mapper already has an input. Right-click again to replace it.
